title: mimosa pigra var. pigra
intro: Mimosa pigra var. pigra, also known as giant sensitive plant, is a perennial shrub native to Australia and Asia, characterized by its sensitive leaves that fold up when touched or injured. Traditionally, the leaves and stems of the plant have been used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The medicinal properties of Mimosa pigra var. pigra include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and prevent infection. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, are used to extract its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
